title: Palladium SuperHeroes Server
description: A Server for the Palladium Mod and its various Mods and Addons including Sym's Armored Industries, SymFormers, and Alien Evolution (Omnitrix). These offer characters from many universes like Ben 10, Marvel, DC Comics, Transformers, NBC Heroes, and more!
body:
# Palladium SuperHeroes Server

A Server for the [Palladium SuperHeroes Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium)

Includes various Addons offering characters from many universes like Ben 10, Marvel, DC Comics, Transformers, NBC Heroes, and more!

[ComicCraft's Official Discord](https://discord.com/invite/ComicCraft)

---

### Features:

What can you do with this modpack? Well, as the name says it's for a server where you can become any character from the Palladium mod and its addons. These are characters from universes like Ben 10, Marvel, DC Comics, Transformers, and Anime like NBC Heroes

There are also other quality of life mods like Oh the Biomes We've Gone, Naturalist, Ad Astra, and more!

### Mods and Addons:

<details>
<summary>List of Mods and Addons Featured:</summary>
  
- Sym's Armored Industries
- SymFormers
- Alien Evolution (Omnitrix)
- Reborn Heroes
- Foi1y Lantern Corps
- Cursebound
- PantheonSent
- NBC Heroes
- FSang18's Mighty Morphin'
</details>

Note: We're not the Official Server for the base Palladium Mod, neither is this server associated with the creator of Palladium Core. ComicCraft's Palladium SuperHeroes Server is only the Official Server for ComicCraft's Mods (Sym's Armored Industries and SymFormers)

_Special thanks to Lucas (Lucraft) and the ThreeTAG team for creating the Palladium Mod. Also a special thanks to all the developers of the Addons we're using._

---

### Official Partner: Bisect Hosting

Use code COMICCRAFT at checkout to receive a server from the best hosting service with a 25% discount!

https://bisecthosting.com/ComicCraft
